title: Fix SpecFromKey to support nested groups
description: SpecFromKey in repospec/format.go only uses first 3 parts of repo_key, losing project name for nested groups like host/group/subgroup/repo.
notes: GitLab supports up to 20 levels of subgroups. URL like git@host:group/subgroup/repo.git must be generated correctly from repo_key=host/group/subgroup/repo
